series_metadata.series_description: Files include general correspondence, TIP and Work Program review comments, technical reviews, annual reports, certifications, meeting minutes, and other miscellaneous information pertaining to office''s liaison with Ohios MPOs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until scanned into digital media then destroy paper. ; Electronic: Retain electronic documents for 3 years., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
